title: Add autonomous endpoint/extension to interpreter route
completion_summary: Added autonomous mode branch to interpreter route with AutonomousAgent integration and proactive suggestions
context_files: src/app/api/interpreter/route.ts (lines 108-263: existing route with agent mode; add autonomous branch)
acceptance_criteria: Route recognizes sessionMode='autonomous' (via isSessionMode now accepting 'autonomous')
When sessionMode='autonomous': creates AutonomousAgent, calls run(input, mode)
Returns full AutonomousAgentResult including plan, finalOutput, observations, adjustments
Response includes proactive suggestions (from ProactiveEngine) for next actions
Autonomous mode has same rate limiting, timeout, and error handling as other modes
